calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Galo Paz and Sabeeha Khan.

Mr. Paz stated that the parties had been married in a religious ceremony, and were seeking to establish the fact of their marriage on March 20, 2016. The Court replied that there was no marriage license issued for that ceremony, and that under the law of the State of California the absence of a marriage license precluded the court from finding the fact of a valid marriage. The petition is denied.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kevin Macksoud. (Not reported)
